title: Mob Gems
description: Mob Gems is all about capturing mobs in diamonds to harness their powers!
body:
# Mob Gems
Mob Gems is a **Fabric** mod for Minecraft **1.16.5** based around capturing mobs in diamonds to harness their powers!

- With the Capture enchantment you can trap mobs in mob gems
- Bracelets allows you to gain abilities (good or bad) based on mob gems
- Gem Cages utilise mob gems to create area effects

Abilities include:

- Igniting entities to make them explode
- More max health
- Forcefield against projectiles
- Higher gravity


**Important:** This mod requires **Fabric API**


## Capturing mobs
Trapping the souls of mobs in mob gems requires you to enchant a weapon with Capture. It is a rare enchantment that can't be found in the enchantment table, 
but it can be acquired through all other usual methods (villagers & loot). Make sure to have a diamond in your off-hand!


## Using mob gems

### Bracelets
Bracelets grant the wearer certain positive or negative effects/abillities that represent a mob's characteristics.

- **Golden Bracelets** augment a mob's characteristic, granting the wearer an effect that mimics a mob's behaviour, abilities, etc...
- **Iron Bracelets** diminish a mob's characteristic, granting the wearer an opposite effect of a mob's characteristic

### Gem Cage
Gem Cages are magical blocks that utilize a mob's soul for useful effects on the area or adjacent blocks. Gem cages require a mob gem and soul powder (blaze powder + soul sand/soil)

## Notes
- **Note:** Only a few mob gems have been implemented yet, but more are coming!

- **Note:** This mod supports **Curios API** (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios-fabric), which allows you to wear bracelets and chestpieces at the same time!

- **See the wiki** for more info and all the effects of the different mob gems.

- **Suggestions** are always welcome! (no promises though)

- **Forge?** No.
